news.title:
HSBC maintains Buy on Marico with a target price of ₹940, citing strong India volume growth.
Key drivers include 20%+ YoY VAHO growth, foods recovery, and improving Parachute margins.
news.summary:

news.title:
Brokerages issued fresh ratings: Buy on TVS Motor, Marico, Adani Ports, Sobha; Underweight on Dabur.
Key drivers: Dabur's Q4 EBITDA growth, Marico's food segment strength, and TVS Motor's pricing power.
news.summary:
Brokerages issued fresh ratings: Buy on TVS Motor, Marico, Adani Ports, Sobha; Underweight on Dabur.

news.title:
FMCG firms like Marico and Dabur project high single-digit growth in Q4 FY26.
Domestic strength offsets West Asia geopolitical risks for these FMCG companies.

news.title:
Marico's subsidiary acquired 75% of Skinetiq in Vietnam.
Skinetiq, now Marico's subsidiary, owns 'Candid' and distributes 'Murad' brands.

news.title:
Marico rose 1.8% to Rs 756.85 on strong revenue growth driven by robust domestic and international performance.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 12% to Rs 447 cr; revenue grew 26.6% YoY to Rs 3,537 cr.
news.summary:
Marico rose 1.8% to Rs 756.85 on strong revenue growth driven by robust domestic and international performance.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 12% to Rs 447 cr; revenue grew 26.6% YoY to Rs 3,537 cr.

news.title:
Marico's Q4 update shows high single-digit volume growth in India.
Marico targets double-digit growth by FY27; margins to improve on lower copra prices.
news.summary:

news.title:
Zed Lifestyle to undergo voluntary liquidation from April 2026; business integrates into Marico Ltd.
Board, shareholders, and creditors approved; regulatory approvals still pending to complete the process.

news.title:

Binjit Kadakapcedlikayal, Ryan Bartram cease SMP roles under new leadership restructuring.

news.title:

FMCG majors like HUL, Marico, Dabur actively acquiring D2C brands.

news.title:
Marico Ltd trades near all-time highs, aiming to triple Rs 100 cr digital ARR and boost global foods revenue via D2C expansion.
Q3 FY26 revenue grew 27% to Rs 3,537 cr; net profit rose 12% to Rs 460 cr. Acquisition of Zea Maize to enhance food portfolio.
news.summary:
Marico Ltd trades near all-time highs, aiming to triple Rs 100 cr digital ARR and boost global foods revenue via D2C expansion.
Q3 FY26 revenue grew 27% to Rs 3,537 cr; net profit rose 12% to Rs 460 cr. Acquisition of Zea Maize to enhance food portfolio.

news.title:

news.summary:

news.title:
Top FMCG advertisers like HUL, P&G, Marico, and Colgate reduced Q3 ad spends by 6%, 17%, 2%, and 8%, respectively.
Experts predict ad spend recovery by Holi, potentially boosting entertainment platform revenues.
